_meta.description: Scoring rubric for screenshot verification after Figma MCP execution. Vision Agent runs C1–C10 on every screenshot. Each check includes specific fixActions for surgical repair — only failing checks are re-run, not the whole component.
keyChanges: PASS threshold lowered 15→14: single weight-2 miss is now WARN not FAIL
fixActions added per check: exact MCP code to fix only that check
earlyWinRule: C10 naming-only failures skip the iteration counter
sameCheckEscalation: same check failing twice → escalate, don't burn attempt 3

checks.name: Layout Direction
checks.passIf: Children flow in the direction matching spec.autolayout.direction
checks.failIf: Children stacked wrong, overlapping, or using absolute positions
fixActions: // Single property — do not change padding, gap, or fills
checks.fixHint: Set frame.layoutMode only. Nothing else changes.

checks.name: Padding Correct
checks.passIf: Padding matches resolved spacing token (±2px tolerance)
checks.failIf: Padding differs from spec by more than 2px on any side, or content touches edges
fixActions: // Values from auto-layout-rules.json for this component — no guessing
checks.fixHint: Apply all 4 padding values from auto-layout-rules.json. Do not touch other properties.

checks.name: Gap Between Children
checks.passIf: Children have consistent spacing matching the resolved gap token (±2px tolerance)
checks.failIf: Gap differs from spec by more than 2px, or children are jammed together
checks.fixHint: Set frame.itemSpacing from auto-layout-rules.json. One line fix.

checks.name: All Variants Present
checks.passIf: All specified variant × size × state combinations are present as distinct named frames
checks.failIf: Any variant missing, duplicated, or incorrectly named
fixActions: // Create ONLY the missing variant frames — do not recreate existing ones
// Always copy layout from the State=Default variant (or first variant if no Default exists)
// Rebind fills ONLY for the properties that differ in this state
checks.fixHint: Add only what is missing. Copy layout from a sibling. Never touch passing variants.

checks.name: States Visually Distinct
checks.passIf: Each state (default, hover, disabled…) has a visually different fill or opacity
checks.failIf: Two or more states look identical
fixActions: // Rebind fills per state using figma-variable-bindings.json roleIndex
// Touch ONLY the fill — do not change layout or text
checks.fixHint: Each state needs a different variableId. Look up in figma-variable-bindings.json. Apply with boundPaint() only.

checks.name: Text Readable
checks.passIf: Text is visible, legible, correct size, uses Zoho Puvi or Lato
checks.failIf: Text invisible, clipped, wrong font, or too small
fixActions: // Get exact fontSize + fontWeight from spec.tokens.typography (resolved value)
const typo = resolvedTokens[spec.tokens.typography];  // look up at runtime
textNode.fontSize = typo.fontSize;      // exact value — never hardcode 14
checks.fixHint: Always loadFontAsync first. Font name 'Zoho Puvi' must match exactly. Do not change fills or layout.

checks.name: Colors Match Variable Bindings
checks.passIf: token-audit.js returns PASS — zero hardcoded fill or stroke issues
checks.failIf: token-audit.js reports any hardcoded_fill or hardcoded_stroke
fixActions: // 1. Run token-audit.js — collect all hardcoded_fill issues
// 2. For each issue, look up issue.value (hex) in figma-variable-bindings.json → hexIndex
// 3. Get the variableId for that hex
// 5. Re-run token-audit.js to confirm PASS before proceeding
checks.fixHint: Use nodeId from token-audit output to target exactly the right node. Never guess the variable — look it up in hexIndex.

checks.name: Corner Radius Correct
checks.passIf: Corners match the borderRadius token in spec (borderRadius.md = 8px visible but subtle)
checks.failIf: Corners sharp when rounding expected, or rounded when none specified
checks.fixHint: One property fix. Get exact px value from resolved-tokens.json borderRadius section.

checks.name: Component Dimensions
checks.passIf: Height matches naturalHeight from auto-layout-rules.json. No unexpected stretching.
checks.failIf: Component too tall, too wide, or squashed
fixActions: // Height fix — almost always the cause:
checks.fixHint: Set counterAxisSizingMode to HUG. Height should come from content, not a fixed value.

checks.name: Layer Naming Convention
checks.passIf: All layers: component = Name/Variant/Size/State, text = label--*, icons = icon--*
fixActions: // Bulk rename — run via figma_execute with component selected
checks.fixHint: Cheapest fix — do it in Step 7 before the first verify. C10 failure alone never costs an iteration (earlyWinRule).

WARN.action: Proceed. Log flagged checks. Fix before human review.

FAIL.action: Apply surgical fixActions for failed checks only. Increment iteration counter.

scoring.note: v2.0: Threshold 15→14. A single weight-2 miss is now WARN, not FAIL. Prevents burning an iteration on a minor visual difference.

iterationConfig.fixModeRule: On any FAIL: run ONLY the fixActions for the failed check IDs. Do not rebuild passing checks. Do not restart the component.

earlyWinRule.condition: Score ≥ 14 AND only C10 (naming) is failing
earlyWinRule.action: Apply C10 fixActions inline. Do NOT count as a failed iteration. Proceed to G3.
earlyWinRule.rationale: Naming is a cosmetic fix that takes one figma_execute call. Never worth an iteration.

sameCheckEscalation.condition: The same check ID fails on two consecutive attempts
sameCheckEscalation.action: Escalate that check to human. Continue the pipeline for all other passing checks.
sameCheckEscalation.output: PARTIAL ESCALATE — Check {id} ({name}) failed attempts {n} and {n+1}. Escalated to human. All other checks: {status}.

attempt1.onFail: Collect failed check IDs. Run fixActions for each. Re-run token-audit + screenshot verify.
attempt1.log: ATTEMPT 1 FAILED — Failed: {ids}. Surgical fixes applied: {summary}.

attempt2.onFail: Any check that failed attempt 1 AND attempt 2 → partial escalate. Run fixActions for new failures only. Re-run verify.
attempt2.log: ATTEMPT 2 FAILED — Escalated (repeat failures): {escalatedIds}. New failures: {newIds}. Applying fixes for new failures.

attempt3.onFail: ESCALATE TO HUMAN. All MCP execution stops.
attempt3.log:
ESCALATE TO HUMAN — {componentName} failed 3 attempts.
All failed checks: {fullLog}.

iterationConfig.resetOnSuccess: Exit fix loop immediately on PASS or WARN. Never continue iterating after a pass.

outputFormat.onPass: VERIFY PASS (Attempt {n}) — Score: {score}/16. Proceeding to G3 A11y.
outputFormat.onWarn: VERIFY WARN (Attempt {n}) — Score: {score}/16. Flagged: {ids}. Logged. Proceeding.
